user.title: Eneco Dynamic Tariffs
user.description: Enter your Eneco (Mijn Eneco) login credentials.

totp.title: Email verification
totp.description: Eneco sent a one-time code to {email}. Enter it below.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Eneco
reauth_confirm.description: The session for {username} has expired. Enter your password to reconnect.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your email address and password.
error.invalid_totp: Incorrect or expired verification code. Please try again.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Eneco. Please try again later.

abort.already_configured: This Eneco account is already configured.
